title: Sasken Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sasken Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
